jobs.name: Ausbildung Chemikant:in (m/w/d) Stellendetails
jobs.description:
Ausbildung Chemikant:in (m/w/d) Stellendetails | BASF SE Zum Hauptinhalt Stellen finden Sprache Ceština (Ceská republika) Dansk (Danmark) Deutsch (Deutschland) Ελληνικά (Ελλάδα) English (United States) Español (España) Español (México) Français (France) Magyar (Magyarország) Italiano (Italia) 日本語 (日本) 한국어 (대한민국) Norsk bokmål ‎(Norwegian Bokmål) Nederlands (België / Nederland) Polski (Polska) Português (Brasil) Português (Portugal) Slovencina (Slovensko) Svenska (Konungariket Sverige) ภาษาไทย (ประเทศไทย) Türkçe (Türkiye) 简体中文 (中国大陆) 繁體中文(台灣) Profil-Login Anmeldung für Mitarbeitende Stellenbeschreibung Ausbildung Chemikant:in (m/w/d) STANDORT FIRMA AUSBILDUNGSBEGINN (‑DAUER) STANDORT FIRMA AUSBILDUNGSBEGINN (‑DAUER) Jetzt bewerben WILLKOMMEN BEI UNS Wir sind BASF in der Landwirtschaft und alles, was wir tun, tun wir aus Liebe zur Landwirtschaft und dem wichtigsten Beruf auf der Erde. Die BASF Agricultural Solutions Deutschland GmbH ist ein international erfolgreiches Unternehmen der BASF-Gruppe. Unsere Lösungen sind speziell für verschiedene Anbausysteme entwickelt. Sie verbinden Saatgut und speziell gezüchtete Pflanzeneigenschaften, Pflanzenschutzprodukte, digitale Tools und Nachhaltigkeitsansätze, um Landwirten, Züchtern und anderen Interessengruppen entlang der Wertschöpfungskette bestmögliche Ergebnisse zu bieten. Mit Teams im Labor, auf dem Feld, im Büro und in der Produktion tun wir alles, was in unserer Macht steht, um eine nachhaltige Zukunft für die Landwirtschaft zu schaffen. #ForTheLoveOfFarming#TheBiggestJobOnEarth Hier erhältst du nähere Einblicke in unsere Vision bei Agricultural Solutions! ELEMENTE DEINER AUSBILDUNG Was wäre ein Unternehmen ohne seine Chemikant:innen? Unvorstellbar! Als Chemikant:in übernimmst Du anspruchsvolle Aufgaben im gesamten Herstellungsprozess: vom Bereitstellen der Inhaltsstoffe bis zur Abfüllung. Du bedienst und überwachst die Produktionsanlagen, entnimmst regelmäßig Proben und analysierst die Produkte – einschließlich der Dokumentation. Damit bekommst Du nicht nur einen Einblick in unsere spannende Produktwelt, sondern bist bei der Produktion mittendrin statt nur dabei. Du wirkst daran mit, dass wir die besten Produkte herstellen. DAS LERNST DU WÄHREND DEINER AUSBILDUNG Erlernen der industriellen Herstellung unterschiedlicher chemischer Erzeugnisse und Produkte Steuern und Überwachen der Produktionsanlagen und des Produktionsablaufes Mitwirken bei der Verfahrensentwicklung zur Herstellung chemischer Produkte Durchführen von Wartungsarbeiten Entnahme von Produktproben und Untersuchung im Labor Einhalten der hohen Standards bei Umweltschutz und Arbeitssicherheit Kennenlernen digitaler Lösungen und KI-Anwendungen, mit denen Arbeitsabläufe effizienter gestaltet werden können Neugierig geworden? Schau dir hier unser Video an! DAS BRINGST DU MIT mindestens eine Berufsreife / einen Hauptschulabschluss Bereitschaft zur Schichtarbeit, körperliche Belastbarkeit, keine Angst vor größeren Höhen und sicheres Farbsehvermögen Verantwortungsbewusstsein, Genauigkeit und Sorgfalt beim Arbeiten Begeisterung für Chemie und Technik Motivation, sich in moderne Technologien wie KI einzuarbeiten und im Arbeitsalltag anzuwenden DAS BIETEN WIR IN DEINER AUSBILDUNG eine hochqualifizierte Ausbildung bei BASF Agricultural Solutions Deutschland GmbH, einem internationalen Unternehmen für landwirtschaftliche Lösungen spannende und vielfältige Ausbildungsinhalte durch die Kooperation mit der BASF SE in Ludwigshafen und der BBS Naturwissenschaft in Ludwigshafen maßgeschneiderte Schulungsangebote sowie die Möglichkeit zur Teilnahme an EU-Austauschprojekten attraktive Vergütung – du startest mit 1147 Euro pro Monat im 1. Ausbildungsjahr sowie zahlreichen Zusatzleistungen wie zum Beispiel Jahresprämie, Erfolgsbeteiligung, 700 Euro Urlaubsgeld, betriebliche Altersvorsorge, Teilnahme am BASF Aktienprogramm, Tablet,  Essensgeldzuschuss, Zuschuss Jobticket 30 Tage Urlaub und 37,5 Stunden-Woche Freizeit- und Fitnessangebote sowie Mitarbeiterevents Wohnmöglichkeiten für Azubis von weiter weg Verkürzung der Ausbildung um ein halbes Jahr bei besonders guten Leistungen möglich gute Übernahmechancen bei entsprechenden Leistungen Neugierig geworden? Schau dir hier unser Video an und werde Teil unserer Azubi-Community! AUSBILDUNG GESCHAFFT - WAS DANN ? Du sorgst dafür, dass unsere Produktion nicht zum Stillstand kommt. Nachdem du das nötige Handwerkszeug erlernt hast, sammelst du weitere Berufserfahrung und wirst ein unverzichtbarer Teil unseres Teams. Außerdem erwartet dich eine Vielzahl interessanter Entwicklungs- und Weiterbildungschancen. DEIN WEG ZU UNS: Richtig bewerben - so geht's! Neugierde, Offenheit und Motivation. Für uns steht deine Persönlichkeit im Vordergrund. Noten sind nicht alles. Im ersten Schritt des Auswahlverfahrens bleiben die Schulnoten daher erst einmal unberücksichtigt. Für uns ist der Gesamteindruck entscheidend. Daher LET´S MATCH & BEWIRB DICH JETZT: Bewerbungsstart: ab Dezember 2025 Bewerbungsende: Es gibt keine Frist, du kannst dich bewerben, solange Plätze frei sind! DIE FÜNF SCHRITTE UNSERES AUSWAHLVERFAHRENS: Online-Test von zu Hause aus Eignungstest vor Ort bei der BASF Vorstellungsgespräch oder Video-Interview ggf. werksärztliche Untersuchung Zusage und Vertrag Der gesamte Auswahlprozess bei BASF am Standort Limburgerhof, bzw. Ludwigshafen dauert ungefähr 50 Tage bis zur Zusage. Wir freuen uns auf deine Bewerbung! Gerne kannst du uns direkt mit deiner Online - Bewerbung folgende Unterlagen hochladen: Lebenslauf dein letztes Zeugnis (bei ausländischen Zeugnissen inkl. amtlicher Anerkennung und beglaubigter Übersetzung) das Zeugnis deines höchsten erreichten Schulabschlusses KONTAKT Wenn du Fragen hast, kannst du mich gern unter Tel.:+49 30 2005-59355 / svenja.sollmann@basf.com erreichen oder dir alternativ auch gerne einen Online-Termin buchen. ÜBER UNS Deine Ausbildung findet in der BASF Agricultural Solutions Deutschland GmbH (BASD) statt. Da die Unternehmensgründung erst zum 01.07.2026 erfolgt, erhältst du im Fall eines früheren Ausbildungsplatzangebotes zunächst einen Ausbildungsvertrag mit der BASF SE, gleichzeitig bekommst du die verbindliche Zusage, dass du später einen Ausbildungsvertrag mit der BASF Agricultural Solutions Deutschland GmbH erhältst. Deine Ausbildung wird in Kooperation mit der BASF SE in Ludwigshafen stattfinden, das bedeutet, deine Ausbildungsphasen oder Veranstaltungen können sowohl in Limburgerhof als auch in Ludwigshafen stattfinden. Schon vor Ausbildungsbeginn am 01.09.2026 wirst du deinen Arbeitgeber der Wahl und die anderen Auszubildenden der BASD Agricultural Solutions Deutschland GmbH in verschiedenen Events persönlich kennenlernen. Die BASF Agricultural Solutions Deutschland GmbH bietet als zuverlässiger Partner der Landwirtschaft innovative, nachhaltige Lösungen speziell für verschiedene Anbausysteme. Mit dem Agrarzentrum in Limburgerhof, nahe der BASF Konzernzentrale in Ludwigshafen, erwartet dich in der Metropolregion Rhein-Neckar beruflich wie in deiner Freizeit ein attraktives Umfeld. jobs.name: Business Development and TD - CASE Applications
jobs.job_field: Business Development and TD - CASE Applications
jobs.description: We are a leading chemical company, with the best teams developing intelligent solutions for our customers, and for a sustainable future. We connect and develop people with diverse talents all over the world. For you, this means a variety of ways to progress. Not only your performance but also your personality matter to us, regardless of gender, age, ethnicity, orientation, and background.  At BASF, careers develop from opportunities. Job Description: O bjectives of the Position To implement CASE and eMobility, Performance Materials India sales & marketing strategy in new business development and customers’ management by initiating contacts with existing and potential customers. Develop & execute Business Development plan for CASE and eMobility in accordance with the country & regional strategy and objectives. Establish & foster strong relationship with customers & industry. Identifying new business opportunities, managing relationships with key stakeholders, and executing strategic initiatives to meet CASE's business goals. M ain Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Business Development: Provide technical support and expertise on CASE (coatings, composites, adhesives, sealants, and elastomers) and eMobility products to clients and internal teams. Understand product specifications, applications, and industry standards. Identify, evaluate, develop, pursue, and implement new business opportunities and strategies that align with CASE's goals and objectives to increase market share and revenue. Assist the sales team with technical presentations, product demonstrations, and client training sessions. Collaborate with Technical Development & Product Development teams to improve existing products and develop new solutions based on market needs. Manage projects related to product applications, client requirements, and technical support. Oversee and manage business development projects, ensuring timely and successful completion. Prepare and present regular reports on business development activities, market analysis, and client feedback. Monitor and report on business development activities, providing insights and recommendations for continuous improvement. Conduct market research to identify trends, competitor activities, and potential areas for growth. Provide insights to guide business strategies. Strategy: Define CASE and eMobility milestones, market directions, project pipeline (products & applications), volume, profit, product portfolio and developmental goals & directions in India. Identify business opportunity for established and new customer/product/application and develop value proposition on products and pricing for CASE and eMobility in India and provide on-going update to the regional team. Monitor and analyze development in the segment and initiate improvement opportunities. Scout, identify, analyze, define and set up target applications, target customers (OEMs & Tiers), target products and drive the business growth for the accounts plan with the country with sales and TD team. Observe and transfer new market trend/development and prepare business case for new product or application development. Identify and prioritize translation/multiplication business opportunity globally from other countries or regions. Monitor legislative, technological and social changes in e-Mobility & new energy and participate / lead the key industry associations in the segment in the country Develop deep knowledge of market intelligence network in the segment to be well prepared for marketing counter measures. Align and coordinate with regional CASE & country PM units and reach out to collaborate with cross-divisional industry group or business units. Customer Management: Build and maintain relationships with key stakeholders, including clients, partners, and industry influencers. Understand market, customer, and industry needs and provide tailored solutions. Supports in providing the response related to quality, technical applications, inquiries, and other related issues, conducts customers’ assessments and analysis. Coordinate with BASF experts to conduct field visits, seminars, presentations and attend to customers’ inquiries. Conduct customers’ assessments and analyses to align and ensure the strategic focus in the right place. Ensure all supporting functions involved in the delivery of agreed customer’s needs; resolve problems/ expedite matters where appropriate. Share M arket Intelligence, strategy & communicate internally via visit reports. Credit Management: Monitor the growth of the customers’ business, review and coordinate with credit controlling team to make appropriate credit recommendations. Follow-up on payment collections and ensure on-time payment from the customers. Team Collaboration: Work closely with cross-functional teams, including marketing, sales, Technical Development, Product Development, CSO, SCM, and production to ensure alignment and support for business initiatives. Job Requirements (m inimum requirement to carry out the work) Edu c a t i o n: Bachelor’s Science degree in Polymer, Chemistry or equivalent, such as Material Science, Chemical Engineering. Working Experience: 5-8 years technical sales working experience preferably with polyurethane industry, CASE background/experience preferred. Technical & Professional Knowledge: In-depth knowledge of Business Development and technical know-how and applications of CASE, eMobility, New Energy and Polyurethane Industry. Applications, applications development, technical expertise, machines, and p rocessing experiences would be highly desirable. Have hands-on experience with polyurethanes (CASE) processing equipment in High/low pressure foaming machine, Spray foaming, etc., would be highly advantageous. Good English and computer skills (MS 365). Job Description Footer:

jobs.name: Laboratory Technician I
jobs.description: Job Description: Now hiring! Laboratory Technician I Geismar, LA We are looking for a Laboratory Technician I to join our Geismar team. Come create chemistry with us! This position is responsible for quality assurance testing of in process samples, raw materials, intermediates, and finished goods within the scope of the Company Quality Policy. Using appropriate software to evaluate data based on internal and external specifications, support the continuous improvement of lab and plant processes through QA/QC activities and meet and/or exceed customer expectations. As a Laboratory Technician I, you will - Analyze raw materials, intermediate products, finished products and other chemical samples and evaluate suitability according to established specifications to ensure quality and availability of final product - Analyze samples, provide quality data and become an active member along with the Lab Supervisor and Production personnel to provide innovative ideas to improve lab and plant processes and demonstrate continuous improvement - Know, understand and use software tools such as Lotus Notes, LabWare, SAP, Microsoft Office Programs, etc. which enhance quality reporting - Ensure the suitability of laboratory equipment through proper operation, maintenance, calibration, verification and good quality control and assessment activities. - Generate quality data and significant statistical data to support plant personnel in their efforts to enhance process control, meet customer requirements and continuously improve our product quality characteristics. If you... are able to work as part of a team, understand chemical and instrument measurement processes, be self-motivated, and willing to develop technical knowledge and understanding of the chemical and measurement processes involved in their respective units, you will need a - Minimum 2-year Associates degree in Chemistry or 2-year technical degree in analytical testing in Chemistry or related field is preferred. 0 - 2 years’ experience working in a chemical manufacturing laboratory environment. - Basic understanding of general chemistry - Basic understanding of theory, operation, calibration, maintenance and troubleshooting of laboratory instrumentation such as gas chromatographs, viscometers, spectrophotometers, pH meters, titrators, etc . - Basic understanding of the techniques of quality assurance and quality control - Basic understanding of math and statistics - Basic understanding of ISO, RCMS, and cGMP quality system requirements - Basic computer skills using software packages such as Microsoft Office, Power BI, SAP, Lotus Notes, etc. Create your own chemistry with you@BASF At BASF, you will have the chance to do meaningful work towards building a more sustainable future. In addition to competitive compensation and benefits, BASF provides you with access to a wide range of elements to help you be your best. It’s what we call you@BASF . We are committed to providing benefits, programs, and opportunities that support our employees’ overall well-being, personal growth, and a safe, collaborative, and inclusive work environment. Just some of the many benefits we offer include: Flexible work arrangements whenever possible Highly competitive retirement savings plan with company match and investment options Well-being programs that include comprehensive mental health support for you and your household family members Family forming benefits (fertility, adoption and surrogacy reimbursement, maternity/parental leave, and more) Back-up child and elder care with discount programs for families of all ages and stages Mentoring and career development opportunities that allow you to share, learn, and thrive Matching gifts program that allows you to deepen the impact of your contributions to qualified charities. Employee crisis support for when the unexpected happens Access to our BASF wine cellar, employee discounts, and much more! About us As one of the largest chemical companies in North America we have been finding solutions for your everyday needs and addressing the most complex economic, environmental, and sustainability challenges for more than 150 years! At BASF we empower our employees with the tools, guidance and opportunities they need to advance and succeed in work and life. Giving you the support you need to be your best and fulfill your personal ambitions is what helps us create chemistry. After all, our success is linked to yours. Whatever path you envision, BASF is a great place to build a rewarding, successful career. Belong to Something Bigger. #belongatBASF Privacy statement BASF takes security & data privacy very seriously. We will never request financial information of any kind via email, private text message or direct message on any social medial platform or job board. Furthermore, we will never send a candidate a check for equipment or request any type of payment during the job application process. If you have experienced any of the above, please contact myhr@basf.com to report fraud. Equal employment opportunities We are an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, age, citizenship, color, religion, sex, marital status, national origin, disability status, gender identity or expression, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. Applicants must be currently authorized to work in the United States on a full-time basis. Job Description Footer:

jobs.name: Mechanical Technician (Leasing) 1
jobs.description: We are a leading chemical company, with the best teams developing intelligent solutions for our customers, and for a sustainable future. We connect and develop people with diverse talents all over the world. For you, this means a variety of ways to progress. Not only your performance but also your personality matter to us, regardless of gender, age, ethnicity, orientation, and background.  At BASF, careers develop from opportunities. Job Description: Main Responsibilities: Memastikan bahwa kegiatan pemeliharaan tidak mengganggu atau menimbulkan masalah bagi perusahaan dan lingkungan Memastikan semua peraturan dan ketentuan kesehatan dan keselamatan kerja sesuai dengan undang-undang pemerintah dan protokol perusahaan Menerapkan kebijakan dan standar keselamatan di tempat kerja Memastikan bahwa tempat dan fasilitas perusahaan dijaga dalam kondisi baik Mengawasi vendor luar untuk pelaksanaan pekerjaan pemeliharaan jika ditugaskan Mengikuti prosedur pemeliharaan (SOP) dan instruksi kerja (WI) Melaksanakan perintah kerja yang didelegasikan sesuai jadwal dengan kualitas yang baik Memastikan semua alat digunakan dengan benar dan aman Bertanggung jawab atas pemecahan masalah peralatan Meminta dan menutup izin sebagai sistem Melakukan penggantian suku cadang peralatan sesuai standar Memastikan bengkel aman, rapi, dan bersih Melaporkan kegiatan sehari-hari Job Requirement: Pengalaman Kerja: Diploma dengan 3-5 tahun di bidang teknik mesin/fabrication/machinary Sarjana dengan pengalaman 1-2 tahun di bidang yang sama teknik mesin/fabrication/machinary Pengetahuan Teknis & Profesional: Memiliki pengetahuan teknis dalam memecahkan masalah sistem mekanik Menguasai gambar teknik, skema PID, alat ukur. Memiliki pengalaman dalam perbaikan pompa, valve, piping Memiliki kemampuan las/gerinda (diutamakan) Mampu bekerja secara individu dan tim Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang efektif Memiliki pengalaman langsung untuk memperbaiki peralatan industri Memahami konsep dasar ijin kerja (safety work permit) Main Responsibilities: Ensure maintenance activities do not disrupt operations or cause issues for the company and the environment. Comply with all health and safety regulations in accordance with government laws and company protocols. Implement workplace safety policies and standards. Maintain company premises and facilities in good condition. Supervise external vendors for maintenance work when assigned. Follow maintenance procedures (SOP) and work instructions (WI). Execute delegated work orders according to schedule and quality standards. Ensure all tools and equipment are used correctly and safely. Troubleshoot and resolve equipment issues. Request and close work permits as required by the system. Replace equipment spare parts according to established standards. Keep the workshop safe, organised, and clean. Report daily activities accurately. Job Requirements: Work Experience: Diploma with 3–5 years of experience in a similar field in mechanical/fabrication/machinary engineering. Bachelor’s degree with 1–2 years of experience in a similar in mechanical/fabrication/machinary engineering. Technical & Professional Skills: Hands-on experience in repairing mechanical problem such as but not limited to pump, valve, piping, etc. Knowledge of technical drawing, PID and measurement tools. Ability to work independently and as part of a team. Experience in welding is preferable. Strong communication skills. Practical experience in repairing industrial equipment. Understanding of basic work permit concepts (safety work permit). Job Description Footer:

jobs.name: Senior Specialist Global Functional Process Owner O2C - Finance (m/f/d)
jobs.description:
WELCOME If you're someone who inspires others, owns their impact and wants to elevate what they do, you'll fit right in. Until July 1, our business was part of BASF. As part of the current transition, all job listings and the application process are still hosted on the BASF platform and therefore fully presented in BASF branding. Please do not be confused by this: All roles are positions at Surventis, and your application will be submitted to us. At Surventis, we go beyond the surface - in everything we do. We put customers at the center, think one step ahead, and develop solutions that create real value and lasting partnerships. We inspire each other to think further, take ownership of our work, and constantly push to elevate what's possible. If you bring your full self, challenge the obvious answer, and want to grow with a team that means it - this is your place. WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT Due to the strategic realignment of the Coatings business unit, a dedicated finance department is being established. This presents an exciting opportunity to develop and shape the finance organization from its foundation. Therefore, we are looking for a Senior Specialist Global Functional Process Owner Order-to-Cash Finance with the following objectives: You own the global Order-to-cash (O2C) Finance processes, which includes Customer Master Data, Invoicing and Billing, Cash Applications, Collections, Dunning & Accounts Receivable Management. You establish and maintain global standards for Order-to-Cash (O2C) processes, ensuring these are aligned with organizational goals and regulatory requirements across the coatings division. Moreover, you oversee the O2C activities, identify and drive process improvement opportunities, leveraging technology and digital solutions to enhance automation, efficiency, and continuous improvement within the finance organization. You manage a third-party business process provider in the area of O2C and will implement process performance KPIs to steer the service provider. In addition, collaborate closely with related functions such as P2P and B2R, you will coordinate integration efforts and you will ensure holistic alignment of financial processes. Last but not least, you engage with internal stakeholders to ensure that O2C processes meet business needs and support strategic objectives. WHAT YOU OFFER university degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, or a related field; additional certifications such as CMA or CPA are an advantage at least 10 years of work experience in financial process management and optimization, with a strong focus on O2C activities in a multinational corporation experience in the chemicals industry or related industry, particularly during transitions or carve-outs, is highly beneficial strong understanding of O2C processes and process optimization methodologies proficiency in SAP R/3 and S/4, process mapping tools, and advanced MS Office skills excellent analytical, problem-solving, communication, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage and influence diverse stakeholders in a multicultural environment fluency in English is required WHAT WE OFFER We offer an attractive salary with individual benefits such as performance-related bonuses. Company-funded supplementary health insurance, accident insurance and pension related benefits. We offer a wide range of local and global development and career opportunities for professional and personal development. Surventis stands for diversity - we are proud of our Coatings employee networks WomenInCoatings, Color Pride and CultiConnect. The feedback culture is firmly integrated into our corporate culture, e.g. through regular employee surveys and management feedback. At our location in Münster, we have our own fitness studio “Freizeit” with a physiotherapy practice, permanently employed company doctors, a company restaurant “Auszeit” including a café bar, a bilingual company daycare center “LackiKids” and a vacation program “LackiKids on Tour”. HOW TO REACH US Bekim Krasniqi (Talent Acquisition), bekim.krasniqi@basf.com, Tel.:+49 30 2005-56136 will be happy to answer your questions for this position. You are also welcome to book an appointment online. Technical questions cannot be answered at this meeting. ABOUT US Learn more about our company here. Diversity is our greatest strength! Become a part of our winning formula for success and develop the future with us - in a global team that embraces inclusion and equal opportunities irrespective of gender, age, origin, sexual orientation, disability or belief. jobs.name: Customer Service Officer with German/French, Care Chemicals
jobs.job_field: Customer Service Officer with German/French, Care Chemicals
jobs.description: Job Description: WELCOME TO BASF Our employees are our most valuable asset, and we foster a culture of empathy, support, and growth. In this way, we empower our team to develop both personally and professionally. Together, we are committed to creating sustainable, digital, and innovative solutions for a better future. Nurturing skin creams, gentle shampoos, sunscreens, mild and eco-friendly detergents, and powerful cleaners for household and industrial use - all these products benefit from ingredients developed in our Care Chemicals division. In addition, we offer solutions for industrial applications, such as crop protection, technical uses in construction chemicals, raw materials for the coatings industry, and digital services for our customers. Worldwide, we collaborate with our customers on innovative solutions, increasingly based on natural and sustainably sourced raw materials. Let’s design a better future together! RESPONSIBILITIES Provide excellent customer service to dedicated customers Support customers along the whole Order-To-Cash process Monitor the fulfillment of your customers orders and react in case your customer satisfaction is at risk Represent your customers interests within BASF by managing your customers’ complaints and deliver professional answers Cooperate with various departments locally and abroad (sales, finance, logistics, transport) Be a high-end administrator by ensuring a proper level of documentation in the system and a document flow that goes in line with company and legal standards QUALIFICATIONS Bachelor or Master degree Relevant professional experience in sales administration and/or business customer service roles at least 2 years Experience with the SAP system, mainly in the SD module Experience in Salesforce would be an advantage Customer orientation and team work abilities Strong communication skills and ability to work in international environment Ability to troubleshoot and rapidly shift multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment Advanced English and German or French BENEFITS We offer a wide benefits package: life insurance, co-financing of MultiSport card, remote work allowance, training & development programs, Company Social Benefits Fund With non-standard items: VIP medical care, lunch card, commuting allowance, EAP Employee Assistance Program (our total offer can be found here) You can count on: gaining experience in a leading chemical company in the world, Work Life Balance, using remote work in a 3+2 hybrid model, and workation up to 3 weeks per year At work, our values are important to us: innovation, openness, flexibility and attractiveness ABOUT US At BASF, the chemistry is right. Because we are counting on innovative solutions, on sustainable actions, and on connected thinking. And on you. Become a part of our formula for success and develop the future with us – in a global team that embraces diversity and equal opportunities irrespective of gender, age, origin, sexual orientation, disability or belief. Job Description Footer:

jobs.name: Field Operations Assistant
jobs.description: Job Description: In the Philippines, BASF has been supporting manufacturers from various industries since 1963. Today, BASF is a leading supplier of chemicals for industries, including Construction and Coatings, Automotive, Nutrition & Health, Home & Personal Care, and Agriculture. BASF also operates an Agricultural Research Station in the country which conducts research, laboratory studies and field testing of novel technologies. In 2024, BASF posted sales to customers in the Philippines of approximately €100 million and employed 92 people as of the end of the year. Further information is available at www.basf.com/ph . Field Operations Assistant O bjectives of the Position: Assist and help the Field Operations Manager in the smooth implementation of in-house and off-site “Farm Operation Activities” of the Agricultural Research Station (ARS) – Bay Laguna. Main Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Assist the Field Operations Manager in the planning, organizing and allocating of resources for the efficient execution of trials/ experiment of the customers: Field Biology Indications (Fungicide, Herbicide and Insecticide) and Insecticide Research (Insectary Team, CTI Team and advance Testing/Microplot Team). Help the Field Operations Manager in creating good communication and interaction with other agricultural research stations, research institutes, universities, and suppliers to gain and share best practice(s). Help in the monitoring and implementation of health and safety policies/procedures, EHS/RCMS/EMS, and DOLE regulations. Job Requirements College Graduate (preferably in Agriculture/Agricultural Engineering) or related Sciences At least 3-5 years of experience handling farm operations Research process, farm operations (i.e., handling farm implements/machineries etc.,) and agronomy (standard procedure in growing plants) Technical knowhow in analyzing the problems and relate solutions to the occurring problems Creative and Innovative – Presence of passion in helping the team to optimize further existing methodologies and procedures Computer applications such as MS Office (Word, Power point, Excel, etc.). Demonstrate professionalism, and integrity at work. Demonstrate high level of energy and maintain stable performance under pressure. Proactive, can work independently and in teams All applications will be treated confidentially. Only short-listed candidates will be interviewed. Job Description Footer:

Als spezialisierte Serviceeinheit stehen wir für eine hohe Kundenorientierung und gestalten unsere Dienstleistungen partnerschaftlich, effizient und zukunftsweisend. WAS SIE ERWARTET In unserer Einheit Risk and Cash Management Systems and Processes optimieren wir globale Prozesse kontinuierlich durch den Einsatz innovativer Tools und Methoden. Gemeinsam treiben wir die digitale Transformation im Bereich Finance voran und gestalten zukunftsfähige Business-Prozesse. Sie unterstützen das Team ab Oktober für eine Dauer von 3 bis 6 Monaten bei der Durchführung von Projekten. Sie nehmen an funktionsübergreifenden Projekten teil und arbeiten dabei eng mit der globalen fachlichen Community zusammen. Im Rahmen agiler Projektmethoden unterstützen Sie das Team bei Datenanalysen, führen Tests durch und helfen bei der Dokumentation der Ergebnisse. Dabei lernen Sie State-of-the-Art Tools im Bereich Datenanalyse, Collaboration und Kommunikation kennen. WAS SIE MITBRINGEN Studium der Wirtschaftswissenschaften, (Wirtschafts-)Informatik, Wirtschaftsingenieurwesen oder (Wirtschafts-)Mathematik starkes Interesse an der Analyse von Prozessen und Daten Grundverständnis von Finanzprozessen erste Kenntnisse in Analysetools, z.B. Power BI oder Tableau sehr gute Englischkenntnisse und idealerweise gute Deutschkenntnisse WAS WIR BIETEN Praxisphase - Theorie aktiv in anspruchsvollen und abwechslungsreichen Aufgaben/Projekten anwenden Teambuddy - Ansprechperson für alle Fragen sowie regelmäßiges Feedback Netzwerke - unterschiedliche Perspektiven, Denkweisen und Arbeitsgebiete kennenlernen Praktikumsvergütung - eine Anerkennung des Einsatzes, weitere Infos hier: on.basf.com/VerguetungBASFSE Flexible Arbeitszeitgestaltung - je nach Einsatzort und -gebiet SO ERREICHEN SIE UNS Viktoria Pohl (Talent Acquisition), viktoria.pohl@basf.com, Tel: +49 30 2005-58390 beantwortet gerne Ihre Fragen zu dieser Position. Unser Recruiting-Team erreichen Sie auch hier: on.basf.com/kontakt Erste Informationen zu unserem Bewerbungsprozess finden Sie hier: on.basf.com/bewerbung ÜBER UNS Die BASF SE mit Sitz in Ludwigshafen am Rhein ist die Konzernzentrale der BASF-Gruppe und Teil des Wirtschaftsballungsraums Metropolregion Rhein Neckar. Das Unternehmen BASF steht für Kompetenz in Chemie seit 1865 und ist heute mit einer breiten Produktpalette in den großen Consumer-Märkten der Welt vertreten. Als größtes arbeitgebendes Unternehmen der Region bietet die BASF SE vielfältige Karrierechancen für Studierende, Hochschulabsolventen und Professionals und bildet in über 30 Berufen aus. Und übrigens, wir überlassen es unseren Mitarbeitenden, ob und wann sie sich duzen. jobs.name: Maintenance Technician
jobs.description: Now hiring! Maintenance Technician Savannah, GA We are looking for a Maintenance Technician to join our Catalyst team in Savannah, GA. Come create chemistry with us! BASF’s Catalysts division is the global market leader in catalyst technologies. The division develops andproduces mobile emissions catalysts as well as process catalysts and offers precious metals trading, recyclingand related products and services. The primary function of this job is to ensure proper maintenance within the facility and to ensure timely productionof highquality products in a cost efficient, safe and environmentally responsible manner. The job requirestechnical and problemsolving skills. Work activities include the repair and maintenance of the facility and its equipment. During your shift as a Maintenance Technician, you will Conduct routine and preventive maintenance on plant equipment and facilities in a timely and efficient manner, troubleshooting and resolving maintenance issues. Work independently, when necessary, to complete maintenance tasks while following written instructions. Utilize hand tools, power tools, cutting and burning equipment, welding equipment, and material handling equipment proficiently. Maintain a clean and organized work area and complete all required paperwork accurately and on time. Adhere to all applicable Environmental Health and Safety (EHS) policies. Wear prescribed Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) and ensure all required safety safeguards are properly used. Notify the supervisor before undertaking any work activity for which you are not adequately trained. Promptly report any unsafe acts or conditions to the supervisor and take immediate interim steps to protect yourself and others from serious risks. Recognize that safety and environmental responsibility are key aspects of BASF’s principles, and promptly report all unsafe conditions and incidents to the appropriate manager to ensure the safety of yourself and others. If you... Possess a High School Diploma or General Educational Diploma. A Technical Degree is preferred. Have a minimum of 3 years of experience in industrial maintenance. Demonstrate proficiency in precision maintenance on rotating manufacturing equipment. Have experience working with SAP. Are skilled in operating equipment such as forklifts, scissor lifts, and boom lifts. Create your own chemistry with you@BASF At BASF, you will have the chance to do meaningful work towards building a more sustainable future. In addition to competitive compensation and benefits, BASF provides you with access to a wide range of elements to help you be your best. It’s what we call you@BASF . We are committed to providing benefits, programs, and opportunities that support our employees’ overall well-being, personal growth, and a safe, collaborative, and inclusive work environment. Just some of the many benefits we offer include: Flexible work arrangements whenever possible Highly competitive retirement savings plan with company match and investment options Well-being programs that include comprehensive mental health support for you and your household family members Family forming benefits (fertility, adoption and surrogacy reimbursement, maternity/parental leave, and more) Back-up child and elder care with discount programs for families of all ages and stages Mentoring and career development opportunities that allow you to share, learn, and thrive Matching gifts program that allows you to deepen the impact of your contributions to qualified charities. Employee crisis support for when the unexpected happens Access to our BASF wine cellar, employee discounts, and much more! About us As one of the largest chemical companies in North America we have been finding solutions for your everyday needs and addressing the most complex economic, environmental, and sustainability challenges for more than 150 years! At BASF we empower our employees with the tools, guidance and opportunities they need to advance and succeed in work and life. Giving you the support you need to be your best and fulfill your personal ambitions is what helps us create chemistry. After all, our success is linked to yours. Whatever path you envision, BASF is a great place to build a rewarding, successful career. Belong to Something Bigger. #belongatBASF Privacy statement BASF takes security & data privacy very seriously. We will never request financial information of any kind via email, private text message or direct message on any social medial platform or job board. Furthermore, we will never send a candidate a check for equipment or request any type of payment during the job application process. If you have experienced any of the above, please contact Careers.NorthAmerica@basf.com to report fraud. Equal employment opportunities We are an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, age, citizenship, color, religion, sex, marital status, national origin, disability status, gender identity or expression, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. Applicants must be currently authorized to work in the United States on a full-time basis.

Not only your performance but also your personality matter to us, regardless of gender, age, ethnicity, orientation, and background.  At BASF, careers develop from opportunities. Job Description: OBJECTIVES OF THE POSITION Segment: Cold forming (wire drawing, tube drawing, cold forging) Region: APAC (mainly China, India and SEA) Provide troubleshooting activities & support new line start-ups Survey key/strategic accounts to provide continuous improvement suggestions and support MAIN AREAS OF RESPONSIBILITIES AND KEY ACTIVITIES Provide technical support, virtual and on-site for regional key/strategic customers in the APAC region – focus on cold forming (wire & tube drawing; cold forging) (escalation function and back-up for local teams like tech. sales, TSS and Onsite if existing) Handle trouble shooting onsite including lab simulations of field scenarios in collaboration with Application team Support line audits Provide product recommendation Manage line starts especially for bath make-up calculation, initial parameter checks after, if necessary align with local teams on corrections/counter measures after first production Manage technical trainings in close collaboration with customers and sales teams Communicate with regional and global colleagues in English, being the link between local, regional and international colleagues Prepare and share trouble shooting experiences and lessons learned regionally Communicate technology gaps and opportunities to Regional Marketing Managers Consult for layouting of new plants and plant optimization Support and be back-up of Application team if necessary Supporting sales and segments gaining new customer projects JOB REQUIREMENTS At least Bachelor of Chemistry/engineering or related preferred At least 5 years of working experience in surface treatment or related industry Microsoft Office user skills (i.e. PowerPoint, Excel, Word, Outlook) Strong in intercultural communication Job Description Footer:

jobs.name: Deputy Manager - Sales, Surface Treatment, Coatings
jobs.description: We are a leading chemical company, with the best teams developing intelligent solutions for our customers, and for a sustainable future. We connect and develop people with diverse talents all over the world. For you, this means a variety of ways to progress. Not only your performance but also your personality matter to us, regardless of gender, age, ethnicity, orientation, and background.  At BASF, careers develop from opportunities. Job Description: OBJECTIVES THE POSITION Manage sales of surface treatment business unit under the Chemetall® brand via direct and indirect distribution in assigned northern territories of VN aiming to generate sustainable sales growth for G-ECT SEA. Identify and exploit market potential as well as to explore and create customer needs to ensure profitable sales growth by new and existing technologies in new and existing customers. Take full sales responsibility for Northern Territories, the Sales Manager coordinates Surface Treatment activities for Industry and Automotive (OEM/Component Activities) and thereby acts as single point of contact (SPOC) for Segment Management APAC and Business Management SEA. MAIN AREAS OF RESPONSIBILITIES AND KEY ACTIVITIES Sales Management and Development: Explore and develop new business by high market presence in the field to ensure sustainable growth. Prepare, negotiate, and conclude business contracts and maintain business growth with customers. Ensure relationship management w/ all levels of seniority of customer organization (esp. key decider). Coordinate launch of new products at key customers aligned with Business Management and Marketing Provide trainings and share know-how with customers and distribution partners to ensure that the full potential and advantages of G-ECT’s products and process solutions are being materialized. Maintain and manage sales opportunities, leads, and visit reports maintained in Salesforce CRM tool. Ensure accurate demand forecasting as basis for stock planning to secure reliable supply to Vietnam. Ensure “on time response” related to commercial, quality, and technical inquiries / issues of customers. Achieve net sales / profitability budgets and implement pricing measures timely and efficiently. Market Intelligence: Explore and exploit customer needs, industry trends and drivers, unique selling proposition to recommend the best solution(s), leading to the achievement of value creation for the customers and BASF (by Chemetall Process /Solution Selling approach). Conduct studies and analyze market trends, competitors, product applications, processes and technology and develop related marketing / selling strategies for VN market. Cooperate with G-ECT SEA Business and Marketing as well as APAC Segment Management to develop a strategic growth roadmap for the assigned sales segments in Vietnam. Technical Service / Consultancy: Ensure technical consultancy and support to customers on product applications, process optimization, trouble-shootings, and handling complaints by yourself and/or by connecting the customer teams with our regional technology experts and local technical sales support to provide solutions to proactively avoid or sort out technical issues. Initiate technical lab support or reformulations request of products via CURT workflows in Salesforce Miscellaneous: Participate in and contribute to regional / subregional G-ECT meetings, workshops, and conferences Follow-up on payment collections and ensure on-time payment from the customers in case of overdue Strictly adherence to BASF Group’s Compliance Code of Conduct as well as all BASF country policies JOB REQUIREMENTS Bachelor Degree in Chemistry or Commerce. Minimum 5 years experiences in commercial or technical roles in Metal Surface Treatment industry Ability to work in multi-cultural environments and matrix organizations Good knowledge of Surface Treatment market, products, application processes and technology Native Vietnamese and good command and English; additional language such as Korean, Japanese, or Chinese language are an advantage Presentation, conflict management and communication skills to convince all levels of seniority and departments, such as GM, Production, Application and Procurement as well as Line operators and Lab staff Relationship management and negotiation skills Microsoft Office user skills (i.e. PowerPoint, Excel, Word, Outlook); additionally Salesforce CRM know-how is an advantage Required Competencies: Act with Entrepreneurial Drive, Demonstrate Customer Focus, Communicate Effectively, Develop Self & Others. Job Description Footer:

jobs.name: Assistant Manager, Order Management Delivery
jobs.description: We are a leading chemical company, with the best teams developing intelligent solutions for our customers, and for a sustainable future. We connect and develop people with diverse talents all over the world. For you, this means a variety of ways to progress. Not only your performance but also your personality matter to us, regardless of gender, age, ethnicity, orientation, and background.  At BASF, careers develop from opportunities. Objectives of the Position This position aims to provide end-to-end delivery services by efficiently handling customer service and logistics management to maintain business continuity, enhance service level and safety continuity in south of China on acrylate business. Main Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities OTC Delivery Plan Coordinator Lead regular meetings with sites and planners for delivery plan drafting. Develop and continuously optimize daily delivery plans to ensure on-time fulfillment of customer demand and maintain service reliability. Lead real-time adjustments to delivery plans in response to operational constraints ensuring minimal disruption. Collaborate with Sales teams to manage allocation priorities during supply issues. Serve as the central communication point with OTC, ensuring timely updates and alignment on revised delivery plans. Drive key strategic digital projects to enhance process efficiency and compliance. Dynamic business OTC Expert Streamline complex business scenarios into workable OTC process. Dynamic business OTC backup. Cross-functional Communication Act as a key liaison among Master/Finite Planners, Sales, OTC, Site Logistics, and Logistic Service Providers. Ensure timely notifications to relevant stakeholders for any changes impacting operations. Process Improvement Support continuous improvement in scheduling and coordination processes. Contribute to system troubleshooting and operational efficiency initiatives. Job Requirements Education: Bachelor’s degree or higher in International Trade, Logistics, Supply Chain Management, or a related discipline. Lean Six Sigma Green Belt certification is preferred. Work Experience: Minimum of 5 years of hands-on experience in OTC. Experience in planning or logistics is an added advantage. Background in fast‑paced, high‑volume industries—such as chemicals, trading, retail, or commodities (including bulk products)—is preferred. Technical & Professional Knowledge: Language Skills: Proficient in Mandarin (both written and spoken) for communication with customers in China, as well as fluency in English. Technical Skills: Strong proficiency in SAP and Excel is required. Knowledge of Power BI and basic programming capabilities is a plus. Personal Attributes: Proactive and continuously eager to learn, with the confidence to navigate complex situations and resolve challenges. Comfortable stepping beyond defined responsibilities when needed—such as helping shape new processes or partnering with leaders to drive workflow improvements. Note: This position requires flexibility to work according to China holiday arrangement.

jobs.description:

La participación se encuentra bajo convenio entre BASF Mexicana y ANIQ en la posición mencionada. BASF, es una empresa que otorga igualdad de oportunidades. Haciendo un compromiso con la inclusión, proporcionando siempre que sea posible, ajustes razonables a las personas con discapacidad o con alguna necesidad específica, para garantizar su acceso y el uso de servicios. En caso de requerir algún apoyo, favor de comunicarlo durante tu primer contacto con Atracción de Talento . jobs.name: Lead - Technical Development, FSL and Head - PU Application Development Lab
jobs.description: We are a leading chemical company, with the best teams developing intelligent solutions for our customers, and for a sustainable future. We connect and develop people with diverse talents all over the world. For you, this means a variety of ways to progress. Not only your performance but also your personality matter to us, regardless of gender, age, ethnicity, orientation, and background.  At BASF, careers develop from opportunities. Job Description: About the Role Support customers and Sales (Marketing) on technical solution thru Technical Service/ development and drive PMU Project management. Identify their needs and market opportunities in the field of PU Systems thru Technical Marketing / Technical Development and Service for mutual growth. Establish the Material & Technical solution (PU system), material processing smoothly at customer site, product development, fine tuning. Handling customer complaints, coordinate with lab for developments and quality complaints, etc., How You Will Do It Technical services and Business Development in India Identify and develop new applications for PM portfolio in Polyurethane systems for Footwear, Sports and Leisure business Initiate new product development & fine tune formulation to meet customer needs in his region and his expertise in India with close coordination with TD team (Country &Region) Align technical services and application development with local sales or country needs to achieve success & troubleshooting requirements for existing and new business. Manage resources with close coordination with TS & sales team to achieve defined targets. Pursue customer driven innovations / New application and manage joint development projects with full accountability Collaborate with Internal /External stake holders of business value chain partner for new business development Facilitate Formulation development with the lab and region in collaboration with PD Team Ensure closure of Timely NCM resolution, liquidation of non-moving /aged stock and settlement of customer issues Serve as a liaison between Country TD, PD and respective Region team to translate success stories into business growth. Key Shared Accountabilities Regional Industry Team: With Industry Team Marketing: Initiate product portfolio development of industry Contributes & educate regional TD,TS team on product/application/ process challenges Participates in regional TS activities (Trials, new system developments, R&D topics) With Operations With sales & Industry marketing: Align with segment strategies, coordinates TD and PD activities in alignment with country and regional leadership. Thane / Dahej site - Contribute for Polyol Product improvement Standardization of Lab developed product to actual production Work closely with QA team for TS support / fine tuning Localization of C-A thru substitution of equivalent /better quality alternate RM Parameter for success Financial Metrics Cost of quality – No product return if QA released material Discretionary cost < 20 % compared to previous years Aged inventory > 180 days: Nil (Liquidation of Returned goods and Reprocessing-plan) Low cost product development – Evaluate low cost additives, third party base polyols, etc., Operational/organizational metrics Innovations Continuously share customer feedback on Industry Trend, Product Requirement, Regulatory Needs / changes, Information on NBA products vide close interaction with various stake holders in customer organization that helps to Ideate and fill pipeline and project management Commercial excellence Drive best business practices NCM (Technical) resolution Ensure business sustainability What We Look For Bachelor’s degree in Chemical / Polymer Science & Plastics Engineering or Post Graduate Diploma in Polymer Engineering 5-12 years of experience in Polymer Industry. Knowledge on PU system value chain understanding, formulation development, troubleshooting, processing / foaming & Post Molding process are must. Knowledge on A Industry Value chain / PU system handling experience are preferable Knowledge on PU Part Design / Processing are added advantage Work Location Navi Mumbai, India Job Description Footer:

jobs.name: Production Executive
jobs.description: We are a leading chemical company, with the best teams developing intelligent solutions for our customers, and for a sustainable future. We connect and develop people with diverse talents all over the world. For you, this means a variety of ways to progress. Not only your performance but also your personality matter to us, regardless of gender, age, ethnicity, orientation, and background.  At BASF, careers develop from opportunities. Job Description: About The Role According to the Plant / Production Manager’s direction and plant production guidance, implement the correct production procedures by and assigning duties to the Senior Chemist & Junior Chemist and directing their activities to ensure the production completed timely in quality and quantity. How You Will Do It Supervise production Coordinate and monitor the whole process, schedule, priorities of production in shift and respond to any deviations required arising out of the reports (e.g. shift production performance, quality report from lab, quality control department) by effective corrective actions. Set and continuously update production schedules and regulate work flow to ensure maximum use of machinery / equipment capacity and utility supply at minimum costs and fulfill daily/ weekly/ monthly production plan, including trial production. Ensure optimal use of resources to meet the demand Coordinate with Warehouse Team for timely receiving Raw material as per pull list and timely dispatch of Finished Goods from Plant. Coordination with Maintenance Interface with maintenance personnel to expedite correction of non-conformances to prevent and minimize the interruption of engineering malfunctioning. Timely resolve regular and minor problems onsite when incident happens. Report to supervisor of any major problems and take corrective action with proper help after approval is obtained. Quality control Follow plant quality policy and product specifications, ensure to produce quality produce by following production procedures Follow daily inspections in shop floor to ensure high sustained quality product. Production records Raise relevant production records/statistics to Production Manager / Planner / Operations Leader in order to plan, set and update production schedules when necessary, regulate work flow to ensure maximum use of capacity and efficiency. Safety and housekeeping Follow corporate, company and statutory EHS requirements, implement the relevant safety and environment protection procedures Ensure that down the line personnel are following all company’s procedure including operations, safety and housekeeping guidelines to maintain a working environment that supports work safety and production activities. Maintenance of pipelines carrying effluent from plant to ETP Takeover the role of safety representative in the shifts. Implement the Responsible care requirement and guidelines on continual basis. Takeover the role of safety representative in the shifts. People management Conduct trainings to down the line personnel to update their production methods/skills, as and when required. Manage people in the shifts and ensure proper resources are available as per the safety guidelines What We Look For Engineering Graduate Chemical technology / Polymer or related More than 5 years of working experience in plant operation, preferably in a PU Polymer plant. Core competencies: Demonstrate customer focus, Act with entrepreneurial drive, Communicate Effectively Professional competencies: Work Management / Planning and Organizing, Safety, Health and Environment Awareness. Work Location Thane, India Job Description Footer:

jobs.name: Manager - Process Safety & Emergency Response
jobs.description: We are a leading chemical company, with the best teams developing intelligent solutions for our customers, and for a sustainable future. We connect and develop people with diverse talents all over the world. For you, this means a variety of ways to progress. Not only your performance but also your personality matter to us, regardless of gender, age, ethnicity, orientation, and background.  At BASF, careers develop from opportunities. Job Description: About The Role Be responsible to support service recipients in implementing BASF Group EHS requirements and guidance documents, to provide consultancy and support to fulfill legal and BASF requirements on process safety in India or in Asia Pacific countries if requested Act as a Process Safety expert to ensure high quality Safety, Health & Environment (SHE) Reviews for new capital investment projects and existing plant according to BASF Group EHS requirements and guidance documents Provide guidance in implementation of guidelines and programs through workshops and training, and monitoring implementation at the site by continuous reviews, assessments, and audits to achieve and continuously improve high standards of Process Safety performance Review Safety, Health & Environment (SHE) critical changes at the sites as part of MOC (Management of Changes) process, non-standard or new activities at the site level. How You Will Do It Process Safety Facilitate and coordinate SHE review process (SHE 0 to SHE 4 – Facility siting till Pre startup safety review) for new capital investment projects in India or in Asia Pacific region as requested according to the BASF Group EHS requirements and guidance documents using ICI HAZOP or equivalent techniques Facilitate and coordinate periodic hazard analysis (“Revalidation” and “Clean Sheet” SHE Reviews) for existing plants in India or as requested by regional office as per relevant mandatory requirements using ICI HAZOP or equivalent techniques Provide support to manufacturing sites/plants for preparation of BASF internal audit through questionnaire review, site inspections, documents review, measures for improvement and to follow up for closure of non-compliance Support Process Safety workshops/seminars and provide training to enhance sub region-wide competence in process safety for BASF in India as per the mandatory regional process safety training matrix Communicate & support the global process safety related issues or goals into practical programs and systems by providing implementation tools to service recipients in India . Support and coordinate the roll-out of such programs Act as competence center and advisor for process safety issues (e.g., explosion protection document preparation, guidance on internal and local requirements, safety review for critical changes at site as part of MOC process, non-standard or new activities at the site level) for BASF in India and other countries as requested by regional offices Communicate with Regional Competence Center for Process Safety for new BASF Internal directive, requirements and other Process Safety related projects and activities. Support sites in interpreting and implementing BASF process safety requirements Manage, lead, train and develop subordinates, Process Safety Coordinators, Plant Team members and Management of Change (MOC) Coordinators to build Process Safety related knowledge Oversee all process safety incidents of the country, support to service recipients for incident investigation processes, investigation of Process Safety incidents using root cause analysis methodology, recommend corrective measures and ensure completion of recommendations Consolidate & follow-up on status of action items of reviews Monitor the process safety performance, sharing of process safety incidents with all site colleagues in country as part of knowledge sharing Support Business Units, as requested, for assessment of vendors, suppliers, service providers from BASF EHS perspective Work towards achieving “Process Safety Expertise level 3” (a pool of highly competent process safety experts in BASF) for self in alignment and guidance from regional process safety group Emergency Response Advise, assist country management and Site Managers on Emergency Response Planning and Fire Prevention Requirements and Guidance Documents and support implementation. Review of Site / Plant Emergency Response Plans Conduct onsite/offsite mock drills and Desk–Top Exercises Support management and control of emergency response related to offsite transport incidents/accidents. Conduct Fire Prevention Inspection/Assessments at Sites/Plants as per COR R1 requirements, prepare report, recommend improvement action and follow-up review or closure of improvement actions Develop and ensure implementation of Crisis Management plan according to Regional Security Guidelines and standards Country Leadership Act as Country Responsible care (RC) Code Leader on Process Safety. Provide advisory and consultancy services to the sites and interface with regional office Implement country strategy in ensuring legal compliance, corporate conformance, and continuous improvement in own responsible care Process Safety code Be On-demand responsible care code services to Sites. Perform day-to-day consolidated functional responsible care code tasks Establish and maintain India responsible care code requirements What We Look For Graduate in Chemical Engineering (B.E/B.Tech-Chemical) (as minimum) Diploma in Industrial Safety would be additional advantage but not mandatory At least 10 years working experience in Chemical, Petrochemical production Plants or EHS area particularly in handling Process Safety of hazardous plants Must possess knowledge of Process Safety Knowledge of operating production plant(s) comprising various unit operations Demonstrated knowledge of common hazard assessment techniques is mandatory (e.g., ICI HAZOP or similar technique) Conduct process safety risk analysis, HAZOP (Hazard and Operability study) Well-developed conflict management skill to reach team consensus is mandatory. Proficient command of spoken and written English is mandatory Work Location Godrej One - Mumbai Job Description Footer:

jobs.name: Financial Accountant (m/w/d) - Hybrid Option DE Stellendetails
jobs.description: Financial Accountant (m/w/d) - Hybrid Option DE Stellendetails | BASF SE Zum Hauptinhalt Stellen finden Sprache Ceština (Ceská republika) Dansk (Danmark) Deutsch (Deutschland) Ελληνικά (Ελλάδα) English (United States) Español (España) Español (México) Français (France) Magyar (Magyarország) Italiano (Italia) 日本語 (日本) 한국어 (대한민국) Norsk bokmål ‎(Norwegian Bokmål) Nederlands (België / Nederland) Polski (Polska) Português (Brasil) Português (Portugal) Slovencina (Slovensko) Svenska (Konungariket Sverige) ภาษาไทย (ประเทศไทย) Türkçe (Türkiye) 简体中文 (中国大陆) 繁體中文(台灣) Anmeldung für Mitarbeitende Stellenbeschreibung Financial Accountant (m/w/d) - Hybrid Option DE STANDORT UNTERNEHMEN EINSATZGEBIET VERTRAGSART REFERENZCODE FLEXIBLE ARBEITSOPTIONEN STANDORT UNTERNEHMEN EINSATZGEBIET VERTRAGSART REFERENZCODE FLEXIBLE ARBEITSOPTIONEN Jetzt bewerben WILLKOMMEN BEI UNS Die Einheit "Global Business Services" unterstützt die Geschäftsbereiche der BASF mit einem funktionsübergreifenden Netzwerk und bietet dafür moderne und bedarfsgerechte Lösungen. Als spezialisierte Serviceeinheit stehen wir für eine hohe Kundenorientierung und gestalten unsere Dienstleistungen partnerschaftlich, effizient und zukunftsweisend. WAS SIE ERWARTET Werden Sie Teil unseres internationalen Financial Reporting Teams als Finanzbuchhalter:in. In dieser Position verantworten Sie die Hauptbuchaktivitäten und fungieren als Schnittstelle zwischen verschiedenen Abteilungen und unserer Konzernzentrale. Sie arbeiten eng mit unseren Gruppengesellschaften zusammen und sorgen für einen reibungslosen Ablauf aller Buchhaltungsprozesse. Dabei haben Sie die Möglichkeit, Ihre Expertise in der Finanzberichterstattung kontinuierlich anzuwenden und zu erweitern. In dieser Rolle bearbeiten Sie die Geschäftsvorfälle im Hauptbuch sowie in der Anlagen- / Leasingbuchhaltung und führen die Abstimmung mit den Nebenbüchern durch. Außerdem erstellen Sie Monats-, Quartals- und Jahresabschlüsse nach IFRS und HGB für deutsche BASF-Gruppengesellschaften. Sie unterstützen bei den Berechnungen der Einkommensteuer und tragen zum Konzernreporting bei. Zudem fungieren Sie als zentrale Ansprechperson in Rechnungslegungsthemen für unsere Tochtergesellschaften, andere Finanzabteilungen, zentrale Finanzeinheiten der BASF sowie externe Prüfende. Darüber hinaus arbeiten Sie aktiv in Projekten und koordinieren die technische und prozessuale Weiterentwicklung unserer Organisation im Zusammenwirken mit unseren Partnern und gestalten zusammen mit uns die Umstellung auf die neue SAP Version S/4HANA. Gemeinsam mit Ihren Kolleg:innen tragen Sie aktiv zu unserem guten Teamgeist und der Weiterentwicklung der Organisation bei. WAS SIE MITBRINGEN ​​​​​​abgeschlossenes Studium der Betriebswirtschaftslehre / Ausbildung mit Schwerpunkt Rechnungswesen oder gleichwertiger Abschluss gute Kenntnisse in MS Office, insbesondere Excel und idealerweise Anwenderkenntnisse in SAP R/3 und SAP S/4 sehr gute Deutsch- und gute Englischkenntnisse hohe Motivation, um gemeinsam Erfolge im Team zu erzielen Selbständigkeit und analytisches Denken zeichnen Ihren Arbeitsstil aus Begeisterung für die Automatisierung und Digitalisierung von Prozessen WAS WIR BIETEN Bruttojahresgehalt (Vollzeit): 40.000 - 46.000€, je nach Qualifikation und Berufserfahrung, bei entsprechend höheren Qualifikationen 48.000 - 52.000€ möglich - Zusätzlich erwartet Sie ein vom Unternehmenserfolg abhängiger Bonus Attraktiver Zuschuss zum Firmenticket, persönliche Sachbezugskarte sowie weitere Rabatte und Vergünstigungen 30 Urlaubstage sowie Sonderurlaubs- und Sabbatical-Modelle Flexible Arbeitszeiten, damit Sie Ihren Arbeitsalltag und Ihr Privatleben Ihren Bedürfnissen entsprechend gestalten können Bis zu sechs Wochen mobil aus dem EU-Ausland arbeiten Ortsunabhängige Arbeitsmodelle mit definierten Präsenztagen im Büro - Hier ein erster Eindruck Modernes nachhaltiges Bürogebäude in Berlin-Prenzlauer Berg mit flexiblen Arbeitsmöglichkeiten, Dachterrasse und Cafeteria für ein innovatives und teamfokussiertes Zusammenarbeiten - Lernen Sie unseren Standort kennen Teamevents und Firmenfeste, in denen wir Erfolge gemeinsam feiern und unseren Zusammenhalt stärken Jobticket, damit Sie auch außerhalb der Arbeitszeit mobil sind SO ERREICHEN SIE UNS Jennifer Weiz (Talent Acquisition), jennifer.weiz@basf.com, Tel.:+49 30 2005-56454 beantwortet gerne Ihre Fragen für diese Position. Gerne können Sie sich auch einen Online-Termin buchen. Unser Recruiting-Team erreichen Sie auch hier Erste Informationen zu unserem Bewerbungsprozess finden Sie hier und in unserem Q&A-Video ÜBER UNS Die BASF Services Europe GmbH bündelt als internationaler Service HUB eine Vielzahl von Leistungen für die BASF-Gruppe in ganz Europa. Im Herzen Berlins vereinen wir dafür Know-How in den Bereichen Finance, HR, Supply Chain, Procurement, Product Safety und IT. Digital und kundenzentriert gestalten wir Services mit Zukunft. Erfahren Sie mehr über uns unter: basf.com/servicehub-berlin . Vielfalt ist unsere größte Stärke! Werden Sie Teil unserer Erfolgsformel und gestalten Sie mit uns die Zukunft – in einem globalen Team, das Inklusion und Chancengleichheit unabhängig von Geschlecht, Alter, Herkunft, sexueller Orientierung, Behinderung oder Weltanschauung lebt. Und übrigens, wir überlassen es unseren Mitarbeitenden, ob und wann sie sich duzen. WAS SIE ERWARTET Sie stehen kurz vor Ihrem Abschluss zum:r Steuerfachangestellten und sind auf der Suche nach dem idealen Einstieg ins Berufsleben oder möchten neu erlerntes Wissen in der Praxis anwenden? Prima, dann kommen Sie in unser internationales und stetig wachsendes Team bei Financial Reporting. Unterstützen Sie unsere Einheit in der Buchhaltung für die deutschen BASF-Gruppengesellschaften. Bei uns verantworten Sie neben dem Hauptbuch auch die Anlagenbuchhaltung und sorgen für die Abstimmung zu den Nebenbüchern. Für die Vorbereitung des monatlichen Konzernreportings zeichnen Sie sich verantwortlich und beantworten interne und externe Anfragen zum Reporting. Sie fungieren in buchhalterischen Belangen als zentrale Ansprechperson gegenüber unseren Tochtergesellschaften, den Nebenbüchern sowie den zentralen Finanzeinheiten der BASF. Als spezialisierte Serviceeinheit stehen wir für eine hohe Kundenorientierung und gestalten unsere Dienstleistungen partnerschaftlich, effizient und zukunftsweisend. WAS SIE ERWARTET Werden Sie als Bilanzbuchhalter:in ein wichtiger Teil unseres internationalen Financial Reporting Teams. In dieser Position verantworten Sie das Hauptbuch und agieren als Schnittstelle im Finanzbereich. Sie bearbeiten die Geschäftsvorfälle im Hauptbuch und in der Anlagenbuchhaltung und sorgen für die Abstimmung zu den Nebenbüchern. Sie verantworten die termingerechte Erstellung der Monats-, Quartals- und Jahresabschlüsse nach IFRS und HGB, sowie die Erstellung der Ertragssteuerberechnung für deutsche BASF-Gruppengesellschaften im Bereich erneuerbare Energien. Für die Vorbereitung des monatlichen Konzernreportings zeichnen Sie sich verantwortlich und beantworten interne und externe Anfragen zum Reporting. Sie fungieren in buchhalterischen Belangen als zentrale Ansprechperson gegenüber unseren Tochtergesellschaften, den Nebenbüchern sowie den zentralen Finanzeinheiten der BASF. Darüber hinaus arbeiten Sie aktiv in Projekten und koordinieren die technische und prozessuale Weiterentwicklung unserer Organisation im Zusammenwirken mit unseren Partnern und gestalten zusammen mit uns die Umstellung auf die neue SAP Version S/4HANA.
